value: This closes the local artifact gap for applying timestep/mask and oracle reverse mechanics to the 99-D paper-formula state windows, but it remains a debug-only probe with synthetic latents and an oracle clean predictor. It does not establish the unpublished deployed mask policy, trained diffusion network, exact coefficient schedule, TensorRT runtime, or Fig.6 rollout behavior.
